# Student Bulk Upload - Google Form Template

Create a Google Form with these exact question titles.

## Required fields
1. Full Name (Short answer, Required)
2. Email Address (Short answer, Required, email validation)
3. Mobile Number (Short answer, Required)
4. Gender (Multiple choice, Required): male, female, other

## Optional fields
5. Date of Birth (Date)
6. Student UID (Short answer)
7. MAP ID (Short answer)
8. ERP Number (Short answer)
9. Department (Short answer)
10. Year of Study (Multiple choice): 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
11. Father Name (Short answer)
12. Father Mobile Number (Short answer)
13. Mother Name (Short answer)
14. Mother Mobile Number (Short answer)
15. Local Guardian Name (Short answer)
16. Local Guardian Contact (Short answer)
17. Local Relationship (Short answer)
18. Local Address (Paragraph)
19. Blood Group (Multiple choice): A+, A-, B+, B-, O+, O-, AB+, AB-
20. Medical Information (Paragraph)

## Export and use for bulk upload
1. Open Responses in Google Forms.
2. Click View in Sheets.
3. In Sheets, download as Microsoft Excel (.xlsx) or CSV.
4. Upload that file in Bulk Upload Students and run Dry Run.

Note: Google Forms adds a Timestamp column automatically.
